text.title: langchain-chains Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the pipeline need to branch based on input classification?

branch.question: Does the pipeline process a list of independent items in parallel?
Is provider resilience (primary + fallback) the primary concern?

branch.conclusion: Sequential pattern: `prompt | model | parser` at module level.

text.example: q-branches → branch(false) → q-batch → branch(false) → q-resilience → branch(true) → conclusion(r3-scoped-fallback-exceptions).
